tools.Name: Composio Codex Skills
tools.Description: A framework for modular instruction bundles that enable LLMs to execute real-world tasks across 1000+ apps.
tools.Use_Case: Automating workflows like sending emails, creating issues, or updating spreadsheets directly via natural language.

tools.Name: Free Claude Code
tools.Description: A drop-in proxy for Claude Code that enables using various model providers (NVIDIA NIM, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Local) for development.
tools.Use_Case: Reducing costs and accessing alternative models when using AI coding agents in the terminal or VS Code.

tools.Name: Claude Code Templates
tools.Description: A comprehensive configuration library for Anthropic's Claude Code featuring agents, custom commands, and MCP integrations.
tools.Use_Case: Quickly scaffolding and configuring specialized AI agents for domain-specific tasks like code reviews, testing, or database management.
